case_title: MCRAY, SHELDON VS TAMPOL, DON SAMSO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MCRAY, SHELDON AS TO DEFENDANT TAMPOL, DON SAMSO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2000 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCRAY, SHELDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAMPOL, DON SAMSO $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,020.00, PROOF FO SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
